name: Chengdu JOUAV Automation Tech Co.,Ltd.
summary: Chengdu JOUAV Automation Tech Co.,Ltd. is a China-based company specializing in the development, manufacturing, and sales of industrial-grade unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) or drones. Their products are used for various applications, including surveying, mapping, inspection, and surveillance across different industries. Chengdu JOUAV Automation Tech Co.,Ltd. is headquartered in Chengdu, China.
